title: Tutorial screen to QSG screen
scenario: Tutorial screen navigation to Quick Start Guide displays correct image and text per Figma design
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, locate and tap the Tutorial option (or navigate to the Tutorial screen if presented on first launch).
3. On the Tutorial screen, find and tap the Quick Start Guide (QSG) option/link.
4. Observe the QSG screen that loads.
5. Compare the displayed image and text on the QSG screen against the Figma design specifications.
expected: The QSG screen displays the correct image and text exactly as specified in the Figma design.
